description: Native multi-file open picker for `cs upload`, for LOCALLY-served SPA windows only (workspace-*, terminal-*, local::<window_id> watcher-opened workspace windows). Deliberately excludes outbound-*: those webviews render a remote-served SPA, and this command pops a native open panel and reads the chosen files' bytes off the user's local disk — a remote could otherwise harvest arbitrary local files. Mirrors the local-drop scope.
